mainEntity.name: What local signals matter most for Siri visibility if my business operates in several cities?
mainEntity.text: What local signals matter most for Siri visibility if my business operates in several cities?

acceptedAnswer.text: For Siri visibility, the most important signals are the ones Apple can confidently verify and reconcile. That starts with Apple Business Connect and Apple Maps data that exactly matches your website. Use the right categories, accurate hours, complete contact details, and clear service-area information. If your business has multiple locations, keep each listing distinct and supported by its own page. Reviews, local relevance, and good page quality can also help Siri understand which business is best for a specific query. A common mistake is treating Siri as a standalone channel when it is really part of a broader entity ecosystem. If your name, address, categories, and service descriptions differ across sources, Siri has less reason to trust your listing. The best signal stack is consistent data, useful local content, and maintained business profiles.
acceptedAnswer.description: The strongest local signals for Siri are accurate Apple Business Connect data, matching business information on Apple Maps and your website, relevant categories, service area clarity, and consistent local trust signals such as reviews and location pages. Siri is more likely to surface businesses that are easy to reconcile across trusted sources.
